arts.ttl: Sky Sport Italia: Juventus in contact with Zirkzee entourage, Manchester United resistant to loan deal
arts.sum: Juventus are actively working to strengthen their squad in the January transfer window, with their sights set not only on defensive reinforcements but also on bolstering their attack. The Italian giants have identified former Bologna striker Joshua Zirkzee as a prime target to enhance their offensive options under manager Thiago Motta. arts.ttl: Hancko agreement in place with Juventus
arts.sum: Juventus' pursuit of defensive reinforcements continues, with David Hancko emerging as the preferred choice for both the club's management and coach Thiago Motta.
